title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating how to build a Role-Based Access Control event management system using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The video covers database structure generation, workflow automations, permissions management, and user roles without requiring multiple AI prompts.
